name: TokenQ™
headline: Patients Stop Asking "How Long?" — The Screen Already Told Them.
subheadline: A live token display for your waiting room. No app for patients to download. No internet required to keep running. One payment, running for years.
problemSummary: A waiting room full of patients who don't know if they're next or fortieth in line. Reception fielding "How long?" every 4 minutes. Plastic tokens and shouted names don't scale.
solutionSummary: TokenQ is a two-screen queue system: a reception control panel that issues and calls tokens, and a large waiting-room display that shows the current token, next token, and live wait count in real time.

keyBenefits.title: Works 100% Offline
keyBenefits.desc: Runs on your clinic's own WiFi — no internet needed, ever

keyBenefits.title: ₹0/month Forever
keyBenefits.desc: One-time payment. Zero recurring cost. Zero hidden charges.

keyBenefits.title: Live Wait Estimate
keyBenefits.desc: Patients see their estimated wait time — questions at the desk drop to near-zero

keyBenefits.title: Multi-Doctor Ready
keyBenefits.desc: Up to 4 independent doctor queues running simultaneously

keyBenefits.title: Audio + Visual Alerts
keyBenefits.desc: Sound + screen flash when the next token is called

keyBenefits.title: Hindi / English
keyBenefits.desc: Display toggle between Hindi and English for your patients

howItWorks.title: Patient Arrives
howItWorks.desc: Receptionist issues a token in one click

howItWorks.title: Patient Walks In
howItWorks.desc: Audio alert + visual flash on the TV

useCase: A 2-doctor ENT clinic installs TokenQ on their existing reception PC and a wall-mounted TV. Within a week, "how long will it take" questions drop to near-zero, and the receptionist can finally handle billing without constant interruptions.

faq.q: Does TokenQ need Wi-Fi to work?
faq.a: Yes, but only your own clinic's local Wi-Fi — no internet connection is required at all. It works exactly the same during an internet outage.

faq.q: Can patients book a token from home?
faq.a: That's available as an optional add-on module that layers a public booking link on top — the core in-clinic display remains fully offline either way.

faq.q: What happens if the power goes out?
faq.a: Reconnect and the last state is exactly where you left it, because the data lives locally, not in the cloud.

faq.q: Do I need a new TV?
faq.a: Any existing TV or monitor with an HDMI port works. A ₹1,500 Fire TV Stick or an old laptop is enough to drive the display.

trustPoints: Setup takes under 2 hours on existing hardware
seoTitle: TokenQ™ — Patient Queue & Token Display System | Aaryan Gupta
seoDescription: Offline-first patient queue display for Indian clinics. One-time payment, zero monthly rent, works even when the internet doesn't. Built for Jaipur & Ahmedabad clinics.

name: LeadFlow Automation
eyebrow: Every Lead, From Every Source, In One Place
headline: A Lead Shouldn't Go Cold Because It Arrived From the "Wrong" Channel.
subheadline: Website form, Instagram DM, WhatsApp enquiry, IndiaMART lead — all routed automatically to the right salesperson, the moment they arrive.
problemSummary: Small businesses collect leads from Instagram, website, WhatsApp, and IndiaMART — with no single place any of it lands consistently. Leads get missed, duplicated, or followed up late.
solutionSummary: This workflow pulls every lead source into one view, instantly notifies the right salesperson on WhatsApp, sends the lead an auto-acknowledgement, and escalates if nobody follows up in time.

keyBenefits.title: Multi-Source Capture
keyBenefits.desc: Website, Instagram, WhatsApp, IndiaMART — all in one place

keyBenefits.title: Instant Notification
keyBenefits.desc: Right salesperson gets a WhatsApp ping with lead details

keyBenefits.title: Auto Acknowledgement
keyBenefits.desc: Lead knows they've been heard — instantly

keyBenefits.title: Escalation Alerts
keyBenefits.desc: Manager pinged if nobody follows up in X hours

keyBenefits.title: Source Tracking
keyBenefits.desc: Know which channel actually produces results

keyBenefits.title: ROI Visibility
keyBenefits.desc: First-time visibility into ad spend effectiveness

howItWorks.title: Lead Arrives
howItWorks.desc: From any channel — website, IG, WhatsApp

howItWorks.title: Auto-Captured
howItWorks.desc: Logged in central view with source tag

howItWorks.title: Agent Notified
howItWorks.desc: WhatsApp ping with full lead details

howItWorks.title: Escalation if Needed
howItWorks.desc: Manager alerted if no response in time

useCase: A real estate agency running Instagram ads and a website form used to lose track of leads; now every enquiry lands in one sheet, the right agent gets a ping within seconds, and the owner sees which channel is worth the ad spend.

faq.q: Which lead sources can this connect to?
faq.a: Website forms, Instagram/Meta lead forms, WhatsApp, and IndiaMART as standard; others can be added.

faq.q: Do I need a CRM already?
faq.a: No — a Google Sheet is often enough. A lightweight CRM view can be added if preferred.

faq.q: What if a lead isn't followed up?
faq.a: The escalation rule automatically flags it to a manager after your chosen time window.

faq.q: Can this connect to LeadBoard?
faq.a: Yes — it feeds directly into a pipeline-tracking system for fuller management.

trustPoints: Makes ad-spend ROI visible for the first time
Pairs with pipeline tracking for full visibility
